MaxLineLength:CompleteSessionForm.kt$text = "Number of Long Lasting Insecticide-coated Nets (LLINs) Available: ${it.numLlinsAvailable}"
MaxLineLength:DefaultMainSentryLogger.kt$DefaultMainSentryLogger$"possible_causes" to "Incorrect API key, network error during setup, SDK not initialized in Application, app context issues"
MaxLineLength:DefaultMainSentryLogger.kt$DefaultMainSentryLogger$"possible_causes" to "OpenCV not bundled properly in APK, initLocal() called too early, ABI mismatch, missing native libs"
MaxLineLength:DefaultMainSentryLogger.kt$DefaultMainSentryLogger$"possible_causes" to "Program ID not cached, database not initialized, device configuration incomplete, corruption in device cache"
MaxLineLength:DropdownField.kt$tint = if (selectedOption == null) MaterialTheme.colors.textSecondary else MaterialTheme.colors.textPrimary
MaxLineLength:ImageUploadWorker.kt$ImageUploadWorker$"Upload for ${task.image.localId} already exists on server (conflict). Treating as success."
MaxLineLength:ImagingScreen.kt$is ImagingAction.SaveSessionProgress -> "Are you sure you want to save the session and exit?"
MaxLineLength:ImagingScreen.kt$text = "Please package the specimen separately for further laboratory processing before continuing."
MaxLineLength:ImagingScreen.kt$text = if (state.currentSpecimen.id == "") "Specimen ID will appear here" else state.currentSpecimen.id
MaxLineLength:IncompleteSessionScreen.kt$text = "This will permanently delete the session and all associated images from your device. This action cannot be undone."

MaxLineLength:IncompleteSessionSentryLogger.kt$IncompleteSessionSentryLogger$"possible_causes" to "Room database query failure, coroutine cancellation, database migration issue, session ID mismatch, I/O error"

MaxLineLength:IncompleteSessionSentryLogger.kt$IncompleteSessionSentryLogger$"possible_causes" to "Session ID is outdated, session was deleted from database, mismatch between cache and DB, corrupted local storage"
MaxLineLength:InferenceResultRepository.kt$InferenceResultRepository$suspend fun insertInferenceResult(inferenceResult: InferenceResult, specimenImageId: String): Result<Unit, RoomDbError>
MaxLineLength:InferenceResultRepository.kt$InferenceResultRepository$suspend fun updateInferenceResult(inferenceResult: InferenceResult, specimenImageId: String): Result<Unit, RoomDbError>
MaxLineLength:IntakeScreen.kt$description = "A battery powered trap that uses a light to attract and collect mosquitoes at night."
MaxLineLength:IntakeScreen.kt$description = "A person exposes part of their body and collects mosquitoes that land on the skin."
MaxLineLength:IntakeScreen.kt$description = "An indoor collection method that uses insecticide spray to knock down resting mosquitoes onto a sheet."
MaxLineLength:IntakeScreen.kt$text = "The collector associated with this session isn’t in your current list. You can select an existing collector or register this one."
MaxLineLength:Migration_7_8_SpecimenImageSeparation.kt$<no name provided>$"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_specimen_image_specimenId_sessionId` ON `specimen_image` (`specimenId`, `sessionId`);"

MaxLineLength:Migration_9_10_RefactorSpecimenImageAndInferenceResultKeys.kt$<no name provided>$"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_specimen_image_specimenId_sessionId` ON `specimen_image` (`specimenId`, `sessionId`)"
MaxLineLength:PermissionScreen.kt$description = "Allows the app to show upload progress, completion alerts, and other key background status updates."
MaxLineLength:PermissionScreen.kt$description = "Needed to log exact collection sites and associate each specimen with its geographic origin for field tracking."
MaxLineLength:PermissionScreen.kt$description = "Required to capture detailed images of mosquito specimens for accurate identification and analysis."

MaxLineLength:PermissionScreen.kt$text = "To work properly, this app needs access to your camera, location, and notifications. One or more of these permissions are currently disabled. Please enable them in settings to continue."
MaxLineLength:SessionDataSource.kt$SessionDataSource$suspend fun postSession(session: Session, siteId: Int, deviceId: Int, expectedSpecimens: Int): Result<PostSessionResponseDto, NetworkError>

MaxLineLength:SpecimenDao.kt$SpecimenDao$"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM specimen JOIN session ON specimen.sessionId = session.localId WHERE specimen.shouldProcessFurther = 1 AND session.collectionDate BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate"
